title: impatiens vilersii var. vilersii
intro: Impatiens vilersii var. vilersii, also known as Balsam, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the balsam family (Balsamaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Impatiens vilersii var. vilersii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its use as an analgesic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Impatiens vilersii var. vilersii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
